text: Investigate & fix the root cause of the 300s worker busy-timeout that drops the supervisor into ERROR
description:
The supervisor repeatedly enters ERROR via enterError("Worker session stuck (busy timeout reached after 300s)") — the worker shows a busy indicator and never goes idle until MAX_BUSY_TIMEOUT_MS (watchdog-service.ts ~425). Seen twice on 2026-06-21 (14:23, 15:10 UTC) in logs/7000/out.log.

Hypothesis: the worker wedges on an interactive prompt (permission dialog, "continue?", login, pager) that the busy-detection reads as "still working", so it never resolves and only the absolute timeout fires.

Approach:
1. Use the new diagnostics (logs/supervisor-errors.log + the ERROR block in logs/<port>/out.log, from branch watchdog-error-diagnostics) to read the worker terminal tail at the moment of the next timeout and confirm what it was waiting on.
2. If it's an interactive prompt: detect that state and auto-respond/interrupt (cf. the existing Gemini double-ESC interrupt action, aim bc0a18cf) rather than waiting the full 300s, or escalate to the watchdog earlier.
3. Consider distinguishing "genuinely working" from "blocked on input" in isAgentEffectivelyBusy so a wedged prompt doesn't read as busy.

Done when the cause is confirmed from a real capture and the worker either recovers automatically or the supervisor escalates well before the 300s hard timeout.

status.comment: ROOT CAUSE FOUND (hypothesis was wrong — not an interactive prompt). The busy timer (watchdog-service.ts busyStartedAt) was never reset when the worker went idle; it was only cleared on stop or when the timeout fired. So MAX_BUSY_TIMEOUT measured wall-clock-since-enable, not continuous busy time. logs/7000/out.log shows ERROR firing exactly 300s after 'Logic ENABLED' in every cycle even though the worker was idle (screen static) for ~248s and only worked the last ~47s. FIX committed on branch watchdog-error-diagnostics (dedaef6): reset busyStartedAt=0 in the idle-escalation branch, so the timeout only trips on genuinely uninterrupted busy work. 22/22 common tests pass, typecheck clean. REMAINING: live confirmation — restart the session on this branch and verify no more false 300s ERRORs; then mark done.
